rulings.Rulings: Motion to Strike Portions of the Amended Petition to Determine Validity of Fourth Amendment, etc. GRANTED. No opposition filed. Moving parties' Requests for Judicial Notice. GRANTED. Any party who wishes to argue the tentative must notify opposing counsel and the court (415-551-3702) no later than 5:00 p.m. on Tuesday, January 4, 2012.
